title: UN Sudan envoy urges paramilitaries to halt El-Obeid assault

snapshot.title: UN Sudan envoy urges paramilitaries to halt El-Obeid assault
snapshot.description: UNITED NATIONS: The UN secretary-general’s special envoy for Sudan on Friday called the head of rebel paramilitary forces to urge him not to attack the major city of El-Obeid, where the United Nations fears an imminent offensive. In a phone call with General Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo, Pekka Haavisto “made a very strong appeal,” according to the spokesman for UN Secretary-General
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: UN Sudan envoy urges paramilitaries to halt El-Obeid assault | Arab News
